response.justification: The candidate presents as a senior-level engineer with over a decade of experience, far exceeding the junior/mid-level scope of the role, and their resume is riddled with inconsistencies (e.g., name mismatch, overly broad skill claims, lack of React/Nest.js focus), suggesting misrepresentation or confusion in branding, making them a poor cultural and seniority fit for an entry-level position requiring team collaboration and on-site presence.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: Misleading resume title and name (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Bogdan Szabo)
Overqualified and likely uninterested in junior-level responsibilities
Lacks clear focus on required stack (React/Nest.js/PostgreSQL) and no mention of AWS/K8s
